title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 316.265 - Hairstyling, employees engaged in at public venues not subject to Chapter 329, when
text:
316.265.  Hairstyling, employees engaged in at public venues not subject to Chapter 329, when. — No employee or employer primarily engaged in the practice of combing, braiding, or curling hair without the use of potentially harmful chemicals shall be subject to the provisions of chapter 329 while working in conjunction with any licensee for any public amusement or entertainment venue as defined in this chapter.
(L. 2014 S.B. 808)
